HomePage.headline: Order health. Save time.
HomePage.body: Book top doctors in seconds – the ancient Alexandria way: fast, reliable, and beautifully simple.

cards.verifiedBody: Every clinic and practitioner on Khalas is vetted so you receive quality care.
cards.bookingBody: No more phone calls. Pick a time slot and get instant confirmation.
cards.remindersBody: We send you a WhatsApp reminder before your appointment — so you never miss it.

RegisterPage.pageSubtitle: Enter your basic details, then use the OTP shown in the backend console to finish signing in.
RegisterPage.title: Patient details
RegisterPage.subtitle: This account will let you book appointments, review them, and cancel them from one dashboard.
RegisterPage.noteTitle: OTP is mock-only at this stage
RegisterPage.noteBody: No SMS is sent yet. Open the backend console, copy the four-digit code, and enter it here.
RegisterPage.loginLink: Already have an account? Log in
RegisterPage.providerLink: Are you a clinic or doctor? Register as a Provider
RegisterPage.patientLink: Are you a patient? Book an appointment
RegisterPage.providerSubtitle: Create an account to manage your venues, staff schedules, and bookings.

placeholders.name: Example: Mohamed Ahmed
placeholders.password: Set a password for future logins

RegisterPage.otpSent: Account created. Check the backend console for the code for {phone}.
RegisterPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
RegisterPage.verifyBody: We've sent a 4-digit code to your preferred channel.

LoginPage.pageSubtitle: Request an OTP and enter it to continue booking or managing appointments.
LoginPage.title: Sign in to an existing account
LoginPage.subtitle: Patients and clinics use the same login flow. You will be redirected to the matching dashboard after verification.

errors.missingPassword: Please enter your password to log in.
errors.missingIdentifier: Please enter an email or phone number first.

LoginPage.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

StaffPage.bookingTitle: Choose a service and a slot
StaffPage.bookingBody: Pick a service first, then load the next seven days of available appointments.
StaffPage.emptyDescription: No extra description is available for this service.
StaffPage.emptySpecialty: Specialty has not been set yet.
StaffPage.selectServiceFirst: Select a service to load available slots.
StaffPage.noSlots: No available slots were found in the current window.
StaffPage.notesPlaceholder: Add any booking note you want to include
StaffPage.loginToBook: Log in as a patient to complete booking
StaffPage.genericError: The action could not be completed right now.

ConfirmationPage.pageSubtitle: You can return to the patient dashboard to track the status or cancel before the appointment.
ConfirmationPage.title: Your appointment was created successfully

qr.instruction: Show this QR code at the clinic for fast check-in.

DashboardPage.pageSubtitle: Review current bookings and cancel quickly from the same screen.
DashboardPage.empty: There are no upcoming appointments right now.
DashboardPage.genericError: Appointments could not be loaded right now.

ProviderAppointmentsPage.pageSubtitle: Review incoming requests and confirm or cancel them from the same screen.

ProviderAppointmentsPage.genericError: Appointments could not be updated right now.

SearchPage.pageSubtitle: Search by specialty, doctor name, or location.
SearchPage.noResults: No venues found matching your search.

ProviderDashboardPage.pageSubtitle: Manage your venues, staff, services, and availability.
ProviderDashboardPage.noVenues: No venues yet. Create one to get started.
ProviderDashboardPage.noStaff: No doctors or staff members yet.

ProviderDashboardPage.selectStaffForServices: Select a staff member from the Staff tab to view services.
ProviderDashboardPage.selectVenueForTeam: Select a venue from the Venues tab to view team.

AdminPage.pageSubtitle: Moderate clinics and manage user accounts.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Reset Password
ForgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email or phone number to receive a reset link.
ForgotPasswordPage.tryAnother: Try another email or phone number

ResetPasswordPage.title: Create New Password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your reset token and your new secure password.

ProfilePage.pageSubtitle: Manage your personal information and security settings.

SalesmanPage.pageSubtitle: Setup instant demos for clinics in 3 minutes.
SalesmanPage.formSubtitle: Instantly generate a working clinic page.

fields.doctorPhoneHelper: Used to send the live notification during demo.

SalesmanPage.instructionsTitle: How to do the perfect demo

steps.step1Body: Takes 15 seconds. Use the doctor's real phone number.
steps.step2Body: The app will instantly redirect to their new clinic page. Let them click around.
steps.step3Body: Book a slot right in front of them so they can see the QR code system.
steps.step4Body: Their phone will buzz with a WhatsApp confirmation message instantly.
